channel.title: ipsec on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in ipsec on IT notes

item.title: L2TP over IPSec
item.description: L2TP Layer 2 Tunneling Protocol (L2TP) is a tunneling protocol used to support virtual private networks (VPNs) or as part of the delivery of services by ISPs. It does not provide any encryption or confidentiality by itself. Rather, it relies on an encryption protocol that it passes within the tunnel to provide privacy. L2TP/IPSec Because of the lack of confidentiality inherent in the L2TP protocol, it is often implemented along with IPsec.
